nasb.text: They were amazed and astonished, saying, “Why, are not all these who are speaking Galileans?

esv.text: And they were amazed and astonished, saying, “Are not all these who are speaking Galileans?

cnv.text: 他們又驚訝、又驚奇，說：“你看，這些說話的，不都是加利利人嗎？

ccb.text: 惊诧地说：“看啊！这些说话的不都是加利利人吗？

csbs.text: 他们又惊讶又诧异，说：“看，这些说话的不都是加利利人吗？
